reference: Is this lump superficial or deep seated? It should be examined. Do you have any other lumps in your body? It may be just a lipoma, which is not a big concern and it is not related to upper arm pain.
text: Is this lump superficial or deep seated? Should be extreme. Do you have any other lumps in your body? It may be just a leptoma, which is not a big concern, and it is not related to upper arm.
